mapper.select: SELECT CARTID AS cartId, USERID AS userId, CREATETIME AS createTime, UPDATETIME AS updateTime FROM CART WHERE USERID = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CARTITEM (CARTID, ITEMID, QUANTITY) VALUES (#{cartId}, #{itemId}, #{quantity})
mapper.update: UPDATE CARTITEM SET QUANTITY = #{quantity} WHERE CARTID = #{cartId} AND ITEMID = #{itemId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM CARTITEM WHERE CARTID = #{cartId} AND ITEMID = #{itemId}
mapper.select: SELECT CARTID AS cartId, ITEMID AS itemId, QUANTITY AS quantity FROM CARTITEM WHERE CARTID = #{cartId}
